plain:
Who did the shoot?
Was it you?
It was me
Wunt for free
Pay the fee, pay the fee
Deposit lock the day in,
imma charge the card for payment
Lock at least halfway in
Your brand got a ring to it now —
the content so engaging
We got the hottest infotainment
got 'em commenting "who made this?"
Got 'em asking…
Who did this shoot?
Was it you!
It was me
Wunt for free
Pay the fee, pay the fee
Never ask me to lower my price
I snap like my A7R5
Own so much Sony I'm feeling like Mike
If you try to jack son
hit you with the 45
Millimeter on sight — we seen long days,
we seen long nights, word to the gang
Count down prime time —
lights, camera, action… set, be quiet
Blessed with the spirit of excellence
If you won't settle for less
then connect with us
Them, they just do it for presidents
All of our visuals set a new precedence
How you say you don't believe in we?
You gotta be speaking facetiously
Don't let shortcuts make your pockets bleed
We challenge ourselves,
don't do easy things
Got 'em asking…
